title: Wall mounted motorized clothes hanging devices
abstract: Wall mounted motorized clothes hanging devices including a housing, a rigid beam having a retracted storage position and an extended clothes hanging position, a pair of folding arms between the housing and the rigid beam, and a motorized gear arrangement for deploying the rigid beam between its retracted storage position and its extended clothes hanging position.
claims: 1. A wall mounted motorized clothes hanging device comprising: a) a housing; b) an axle mounted in said housing, said axle having a left axle end and a right axle end; c) a rigid beam having a left beam end and a right beam end, said rigid beam having a retracted storage position and an extended clothes hanging position forward of said retracted storage position; d) a left folding arm including: a left front arm having a leading left front arm end pivotally connected to said rigid beam and a trailing left front arm end with a left front arm gear wheel, a left rear arm having a leading left rear arm end with a left rear arm gear wheel engaging said left front arm gear wheel and a trailing left rear arm end, a left support arm including a leading left support arm end having a pivotally connected bracket pivotally connected to said trailing left front arm end and said leading left rear arm end, and a trailing left support arm end pivotally connected to said housing, said left folding arm being rotatable between a substantially folded position and a substantially extended forward position; e) a right folding arm including: a right front arm having a leading right front arm end pivotally connected to said rigid beam and a trailing right front arm end with a right front arm gear wheel, a right rear arm having a leading right rear arm end with a right rear arm gear wheel engaging said right front arm gear wheel and a trailing right rear arm end, a right support arm including a leading right support arm end having a pivotally connected bracket pivotally connected to said trailing right front arm end and said leading right rear arm end, and a trailing right support arm end pivotally connected to said housing, said right folding arm being rotatable between a substantially folded position and a substantially extended forward position, said right folding arm and said left folding arm being folded toward one another in their said substantially folded positions and said right folding arm and said left folding arm being substantially parallel in their said substantially extended forward positions; f) a left worm gear at said left axle end for driving said left folding arm between said folded position and said extended forward position; g) a right worm gear at said right axle end for driving said right folding arm between said folded position and said extended forward position; h) a motor for rotating said axle in one direction for driving said left worm gear and said right worm gear for extending said rigid beam from said retracted storage position to said extended clothes hanging position whereupon said housing, said left folding arm, said right folding arm and said rigid beam constitute a rigid frame, and said motor rotating said axle in an opposite direction for driving said left worm gear and said right worm gear for retracting said rigid beam from said extended clothes hanging position to said retracted storage position; and i) a self-winding clothes rack including a left cable on said housing's left side, a right cable on said housing's right side, and a roll of clothes lines between said left cable and right cable, said self-winding clothes rack being initially stored in said housing in said retracted storage position and being unwound to present a horizontal rack of clothes lines supported on said rigid frame in said extended clothes hanging position, said self-winding clothes rack enabling extending said rigid beam from said retracted storage position thereby tautly stretching said horizontal rack of clothes lines between said left cable and said right cable and defining said rigid beam's extended clothes hanging position, and said clothes rack self-winding on deploying said rigid beam from said extended clothes hanging position to said retracted storage position.
